name: SES-002
description: A captured access token is no longer honored by the real API once the session that issued it has logged out
descriptionHtml: A captured access token is no longer honored by the real API once the session that issued it has logged out
statusMessage: SES-002: a captured access token must be rejected by the real API once its session has been logged out (got HTTP 200 instead of 401/403 — this access token is a stateless JWT still within its expiry window, and the API appears to accept it regardless of logout because there is no server-side revocation check) expected [true] but found [false]
